text.tspan: Dense state: semantic zoom, collapsed branch clusters, pinned active route, and minimap orientation.
Why do cities preserve some memories and erase others?
Focus mode · active route + branch summaries
Search turns, topics, or open paths
Zoom level 42% · researched turns become compact markers; meaningful branch groups keep names and counts.
At low zoom: shape, position, path, and counts. At medium zoom: titles. At high zoom: complete turn cards and actions.
